displayTitle: Tales of the Jedi: The Freedon Nadd Uprising #1
synopsis:
After the Beast Wars, the new Onderonian monarchy and their Jedi allies under Master Arca Jeth prepare to transport the sarcophagi of the dark siders Freedon Nadd and Amanoa to a sealed tomb on the moon of Dxun. Before the remains can be loaded, a groundborer disgorges hundreds of Naddists led by Warb Null, who seize the sarcophagi and vanish into the depths of Iziz. Tracing the dark side to King Ommin's life-support facility, Arca is ambushed; the spirit of Freedon Nadd empowers Ommin, who kidnaps the Jedi Master while Ulic Qel-Droma slays Warb Null. With the palace fallen, Ulic and his companions flee to Modon Kira's fortress and call for Republic and Jedi reinforcements.

On Ossus, Master Thon presents his new apprentice Nomi Sunrider and her daughter Vima to Master Vodo-Siosk Baas. After building her first lightsaber and training for weeks, Nomi joins four fellow students on a mission to rescue Arca. Meanwhile the Krath heirs Satal and Aleema Keto steal a Sith book from the Galactic Museum on Coruscant and, unable to read it, run the Republic blockade of Onderon to seek out the Sith magicians of Iziz.
title: Tales of the Jedi: The Freedon Nadd Uprising #1
